description: This video discusses strategies for diversifying an investment portfolio to manage risk effectively. It covers the importance of balancing high-risk investments with lower-risk options and the allocation of assets within specific asset classes.
topic_summary: Learn how to diversify your investment portfolio by balancing high-risk assets with low-risk investments and strategically allocating within asset classes like stocks and crypto. Key concepts of portfolio and risk management are introduced [t=0:48-40:82].
aliases: How to Diversify Your Investment Portfolio
